A '''Swiftcut foil''' was a [[foil]]<ref name="Gamer" />—a type of [[Sword/Legends|sword]]<ref name="AIR" />—that was used by the [[Nagai/Legends|Nagai]], a warfaring [[Species/Legends|species]] whose members favored the use of bladed weapons in combat. Along with [[Tehk'la blade]]s and [[Longsword/Legends|longswords]], Swiftcut foils were employed in a number of fighting exercises that were daily customs in Nagai society. These exercises were both a form of [[Meditation/Legends|meditation]] and a sign of social status; success in them could allow the victor to ascend societal ranks.<ref name="Gamer" />

==Behind the scenes==
Swiftcut foils received a single mention in ''[[The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life: The Marvel Series]]'', an article that appeared in the [[Star Wars Gamer 1|first issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars Gamer]]'' magazine. The article was written by [[Rich Handley]] and [[Joseph Bongiorno|Joe Bongiorno]],<ref name="Gamer" /> and the issue was released in [[November]] [[2000]].<ref name="Date">''[[Star Wars Gamer Special Edition]]''</ref>
